name: Dolmas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup TVP® granules or flakes mixed with:
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until tender.
2. In a large bowl, combine TVP® granules with hot water, cooked brown rice, parsley, salt, cinnamon, pepper, honey (or substitute), and lemon juice.
3. Place about 2 teaspoons of the stuffing mixture in the center of each grape leaf on the vein side. Fold up the bottom of the leaf, then fold the sides inward and roll tightly toward the tip to form a firm roll.
4. Brush the bottom of a deep heavy-bottomed pan with oil and add lemon slices. Place a layer of dolmas folded side down in the pan.
5. Carefully place another layer of dolmas on top, being sure not to disturb the first layer.
6. Cover with a pan or dinner plate and weigh it down with heavy canned goods to prevent the rolls from unrolling.
7. Pour 2 cups of hot vegetable stock into the pan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. Remove dolmas from the pan and serve warm or cold.
Per Dolma: 21 calories; 1 gram protein; 2 grams carbohydrates; 1 gram fat
